sql.query: SELECT a.id,a.userId,a.workflowId,a.taskId,a.entityType,a.entityId,a.actionType,a.summary,a.beforeJson,a.afterJson,a.ipAddress,a.createdDate,COALESCE(u.displayName,CONCAT_WS(' ',u.fName,u.lName),'System') actorName,w.workflowName,t.taskName,COALESCE(at.activityName,REPLACE(a.actionType,'.',' ')) activityName,COALESCE(at.activityCategory,a.entityType) activityCategory,at.icon,at.colour FROM tbl_activity_log a LEFT JOIN tbl_users u ON u.id=a.userId LEFT JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=a.workflowId AND w.tenantId=a.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_tasks t ON t.id=a.taskId AND t.tenantId=a.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_activity_types at ON at.activityKey=a.actionType AND at.tenantId=a.tenantId WHERE a.tenantId=:tenantId AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tbl_user_tenant_roles utr INNER JOIN tbl_roles r ON r.id=utr.roleId WHERE utr.userId=:userId AND utr.tenantId=a.tenantId AND utr.isActive=1 AND r.roleKey IN ('owner','admin') AND r.isActive=1) AND (:searchEmpty='' OR CONCAT_WS(' ',a.summary,a.actionType,a.entityType,COALESCE(u.displayName,''),COALESCE(w.workflowName,''),COALESCE(t.taskName,'')) LIKE CONCAT('%',:searchText,'%')) AND (:categoryEmpty='' OR COALESCE(at.activityCategory,a.entityType)=:category) AND (:dateFromEmpty='' OR a.createdDate>=CONCAT(:dateFrom,' 00:00:00')) AND (:dateToEmpty='' OR a.createdDate<DATE_ADD(CONCAT(:dateTo,' 00:00:00'),INTERVAL 1 DAY)) ORDER BY a.createdDate DESC,a.id DESC LIMIT 500
